title: Auto-ChemInstruct: Agent-Driven Synthesization of RLHF Data for Chemistry DSLMs
description: Auto-ChemInstruct is an autonomous multi-agent pipeline that generates physically-validated instruction datasets for chemistry domain-specific language models. The system combines four specialized agents (Hypothesis Generation, Physical Verification, Causal Reflection, Dataset Compilation) orchestrated through a self-bootstrapping reflection loop with temperature cosine annealing. This repository contains the full source code, 66 DPO/RLHF preference pairs with 100% causal reflection traces, ablation study framework, and ChemCoTBench comparison benchmarks.
